nasb.text: nor have we obeyed the voice of the Lord our God, to walk in His teachings which He set before us through His servants the prophets.

esv.text: and have not obeyed the voice of the Lord our God by walking in his laws, which he set before us by his servants the prophets.

cnv.text: 我們沒有聽從耶和華我們　神的話，沒有遵行他藉著他的僕人眾先知向我們頒布的律法。

ccb.text: 我们没有听从我们的上帝耶和华的话，没有遵行祂借祂的仆人——众先知给我们颁布的律法。
